news.t: Goldman Sachs says AI and energy resilience are creating a North-South divide in Asian markets
Taiwan Posts Robust First-Quarter Growth as AI Demand Supports
Small-cap ETFs went on a wild ride. Can they regain momentum after Trump takes office?
Leverage Shares by Themes Expands Lineup by Launching Additional 2X Long Single-Stock ETFs Tracking ASML (Ticker: ASMG), ARM (Ticker: ARMG), and TSM (Ticker: TSMG)

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long TSM Daily ETF (TSMG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Taiwan Semiconductor stock, less fees, and expenses. TSMG was launched on Jan 14, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Goldman Sachs says AI and energy resilience are creating a North-South divide in Asian markets
data.text: Investors are focusing on AI developments in North Asia. China is coming out of more than three years of deflation measured by the producer price index.

data.title: Taiwan Posts Robust First-Quarter Growth as AI Demand Supports
data.text: The Taiwanese economy remained robust, supported by strong demand tied to artificial intelligence, despite lingering risks from the Middle East conflict.

data.title: Small-cap ETFs went on a wild ride. Can they regain momentum after Trump takes office?
data.text: Small-cap ETFs have been on a roller-coaster ride in the first two weeks of the new year.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes Expands Lineup by Launching Additional 2X Long Single-Stock ETFs Tracking ASML (Ticker: ASMG), ARM (Ticker: ARMG), and TSM (Ticker: TSMG)
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Jan. 14, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes is excited to announce the expansion of its leveraged, single-stock ETF lineup in the US with the launch of three new ETFs...
